description: Analyze the microenvironment of the Green Fluorescent Protein (GFP) chromophore using wild-type crystal structure PDB:1GFL. Identify the autocatalytically formed chromophore (non-standard residue CRO at position 66), and select all protein residues within 4.0 Angstroms of it. Create a publication-quality visualization showing the beta-barrel (use transparency or clipping to reveal the interior), the chromophore prominently, and the surrounding contacting residues. Save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/gfp_chromophore.png. Export a text report to ~/PyMOL_Data/gfp_environment_report.txt containing the total count of contacting residues and a list of their chain, residue numbers, and names, particularly noting any hydrogen-bonding residues.
